task_description: Implement Thinking Indicators UI for AI models that show reasoning before the final answer (Claude extended thinking, DeepSeek R1). Create a collapsible ThinkingBlockWidget, update the MessageModel with thinking fields, update ChatService SSE parsing, update ChatRepository state management, and wire everything through ChatBubble and ChatScreen.

verification.summary: Flutter SDK not available in sandbox. Code verified through manual review: all files are syntactically correct, imports are consistent with codebase patterns, types are sound, no magic numbers (fixed pi import), no commented-out code, proper null safety. All acceptance criteria met by code inspection.
